news.headline: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIEN) reveals Q4 2024 financial results in upcoming conference call.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending December 31, 2024. The Company, trading under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: LIEN, functions as a specialty finance entity opting for regulation as a business development company. The announcement was made in New York.

news.headline: Preformed Line Products reported Q4 2024 net sales of $167.1 million, up 15% from previous quarter.
news.summary: In Cleveland on March 13, 2025, Preformed Line Products Company (NASDAQ: PLPC) announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 and the entire year ending December 31, 2024. Key highlights for Q4/Full Year 2024 include quarterly net sales reaching $167.1 million, marking a notable 15% growth from the previous quarter.

news.headline: Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD) declares $0.48 per share dividend for Q1 2025, payable March 31.  Character Count: 88
news.summary: In Miami Beach, Florida, on March 13, 2025, Starwood Property Trust, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share of common stock for the period ending March 31, 2025. This announcement was made by the Company's Board of Directors. The dividend will be paid out to shareholders.

news.headline: BlackRock's BUIDL fund, tokenized by Securitize, exceeds $1B in assets under management, signaling a groundbreaking achievement.
news.summary: Securitize, a leading player in tokenization, has reached a significant industry achievement by successfully pushing forward the utilization of digital assets among institutions. In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, it was revealed that the BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) has exceeded $1 billion in total assets under management, solidifying its position in the market. This milestone underscores Securitize's dedication to revolutionizing digital asset adoption within the institutional sector.

news.headline: Bank of America declares dividends on preferred stock for April and May 2025 in Charlotte.
news.summary: Bank of America Corporation has declared regular cash dividends for their preferred stock series. The Board of Directors approved the payout for the outstanding shares or depositary shares. The announcement was made on March 13, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina. The dividends per share will vary based on the specific series of preferred stock. This move signals the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

news.headline: Northwest Pipe Company starts Community Impact Program, donates to Share Vancouver's Backpack Program. #NWPX #CSR
news.summary: Northwest Pipe Company, a major manufacturer of water-related infrastructure listed on Nasdaq as NWPX, has introduced its Community Impact Program by making a donation to Share Vancouver's Backpack Program in Vancouver, Washington. The initiative commenced on March 13, 2025. This program aims to support the local community through various outreach efforts.

news.headline: NextPlat reschedules 2024 financial results report and investor call to March 24, 2025 from March 13, 2025. (Total characters: 108)
news.summary: The global e-Commerce provider, NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW), based in Coconut Grove, Florida, has announced the rescheduling of its financial results release for the full-year ending December 31, 2024. The new release date will be before the market opens.

news.headline: Drilling Tools Int'l Corp. reports Q4 and 2024 year-end results. Expects growth in 2025, with significant revenue increase internationally.
news.summary: Anticipating further expansion in 2025, Drilling Tools International Corp. (NASDAQ: DTI) estimates growth in consolidated revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and adjusted free cash flow. The company expects a substantial increase in international revenue in 2025. Based in Houston, as of March 13, 2025, DTI is poised to see significant progress in various financial aspects in the upcoming year.

news.headline: Hyperliquid boosts margin requirements post $4M loss in liquidation. Traders need 20% collateral from March 15. $350M TLV in HLP.
news.summary: Hyperliquid, a popular platform for leveraged perpetual trading, recently faced a $4 million loss in its liquidity pool due to a trader liquidating a $200 million Ether long position. As a response, Hyperliquid has increased margin requirements, requiring traders to maintain a collateral margin of at least 20% on certain positions starting March 15. Despite the incident not being an exploit, Hyperliquid sees it as an opportunity to strengthen their margining framework. The platform has a liquidity pool with over $350 million in Total Value Locked (TVL) and has captured 70% of the market share in the perps exchange, with a daily transaction volume of around $180 million as of March 12. The platform boasts fast settlement times and low fees but is less decentralized than other exchanges.

news.headline: Plymouth Industrial REIT appoints Robert O. Stephenson to the Board of Directors as an independent member effective March 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Boston, on March 13, 2025, Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. declared the addition of Robert O. Stephenson to its Board of Directors. Stephenson, an independent director, will also join the Audit Committee of the company. Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PLYM.

news.headline: Innventure, Inc. (Nasdaq: INV) to attend 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17, 2025 in Newport Beach, California. CEO and CIO to attend.
news.summary: Innventure, Inc. (Nasdaq: INV), a technology commercialization platform based in Orlando, Florida, revealed that CEO Bill Haskell and CIO Lucas Harper will participate in the 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17, 2025, in Newport Beach, California. This presents an opportunity for investor interactions.

news.headline: President Trump escalates trade threats, risking trade wars with allies as he issues new retaliatory measures.
news.summary: As tensions rise due to trade disputes, the president is escalating the situation by issuing fresh threats in an attempt to compel trading partners to cease retaliatory actions. This could potentially lead to a spiraling effect in trade conflicts with allies. The president's strategy involves employing new tactics in trade negotiations to pressure partners into backing down from retaliation measures. The situation is precarious as both sides are engaging in a tit-for-tat approach, with increasing threats and counter-threats. This escalation comes amidst escalating trade tensions, with the impact felt globally. As the trade war heats up, there is a growing concern over the potential economic repercussions, with trade numbers being significantly affected.

news.headline: NCS Multistage Holdings CEO to present at Emerging Growth Conference on March 27, 2025 at 11:35 a.m. CT.
news.summary: In Houston on March 13, 2025, NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:NCSM) shared news that CEO Ryan Hummer will speak at the Emerging Growth Conference on March 27, 2025. The presentation is set for 11:35 a.m. CT (12:35 p.m. ET).

news.headline: Stratus Properties refinances Jones Crossing in Texas with $24M loan, lowering interest rate and boosting cash.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Stratus Properties Inc. (NASDAQ: STRS) has successfully closed a $24.0 million non-recourse loan to refinance the existing loan for the retail property at Jones Crossing. This development is a mixed-use project in College Station, Texas, which is home to Texas A&M University. The new loan has a maturity date of April 1, 2028, offering a lower interest rate compared to the previous loan. As a result of this refinancing, Stratus received approximately net cash proceeds.

news.headline: Private ETF sees limited inflows despite efforts, as reported on 03/13/25 by Bloomberg.
news.summary: In recent data released, it was revealed that the unemployment rate fell to 5.2%, with the economy adding 235,000 jobs in the last month. Wages also saw an increase of 3.9% compared to last year. This positive trend indicates a strengthening labor market and growing confidence in the economy. Furthermore, the report highlighted a rise in consumer spending by 0.6% in the last quarter, contributing to the overall growth of the economy. Overall, these statistics point towards a favorable outlook for both job seekers and businesses in the current economic climate.

news.headline: Cra-Z-Art responds to tariffs by boosting toy manufacturing in the USA to accelerate domestic expansion. Celebrating 100th anniversary in 2023, Cra-Z-Art plans significant increase in manufacturing.
news.summary: A company called Cra-Z-Art, based in Randolph, N.J., with a history dating back to 1923, has revealed its intent to boost toy production within the United States. This company, marking its 100th anniversary in 2023, is well-known for its role as a top manufacturer and pioneer in the toy, art, activity, and school supply sectors. The decision to ramp up toy manufacturing operations is significant, reflecting their commitment to expansion and meeting heightened demand for their products. The move underscores their dedication to strengthening their presence in the market and their drive to capitalize on growth opportunities.

news.headline: Mach Natural Resources LP reported Q4 2024 results, with $22 million reduction in interest expense for increased cash flow.
news.summary: In Oklahoma City, Mach Natural Resources LP (NYSE: MNR) shared its financial and operational outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2024. The company announced a positive adjustment in its projected free cash flow for 2025 by reducing its interest expense midpoint by $22 million. Key highlights from the fourth quarter of 2024 include achieving a total net production of 86.7 thousand barrels of oil equivalent per day ("Mboe/d"). The company also managed to decrease its lease operating expenses during this period.

news.headline: Shuttle Pharma closed $5.75M offering, selling 19.1M shares at $0.30 each to improve outcomes for cancer patients.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on March 13, 2025, Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHPH), known as Shuttle Pharma, a specialty pharmaceutical company in the research and development phase, dedicated to enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy (RT), has recently completed a public offering. The offering comprised 19,166,667 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants for common stock) at a price of $0.30 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of approximately $5.75 million for Shuttle Pharma, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and other associated expenses.

news.headline: Company to liquidate 2 ETFs (bitcoin & ethereum futures) to align with market dynamics, clients' needs & digital assets.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, 21Shares US LLC revealed the planned closure of two cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs). These funds, focused on bitcoin futures and ethereum futures, are part of the firm's initiative to adjust its product offerings according to market changes, client requirements, and the evolving digital assets sector. 21Shares US LLC is a subsidiary of 21Shares AG, a prominent issuer of ETFs related to cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Stocks dip 10% as tariff fears weigh. S&P 500 nears correction territory from Feb high amid trade uncertainty.
news.summary: Investors are on edge as the S&P 500 approaches a correction, standing at a 10% decline from its peak in February. Uncertainty surrounding tariffs and trade negotiations continues to unsettle markets, with investors closely monitoring developments.

news.headline: 100% Chiropractic founders Drs. Jason and Vanessa Helfrich to transition to advisory roles for company growth and franchisees.
news.summary: The innovative founders, Dr. Jason and Dr. Vanessa Helfrich, have decided to shift towards advisory roles to assist in the success of franchisees, company expansion, and brand objectives. Based in Scottsdale, Arizona, as of March 13, 2025, 100% Chiropractic, an esteemed provider of chiropractic services and wellness offerings, is making this strategic move.

news.headline: Brooklyn townhouse renovation prioritizes sustainability, maximizing daylight, and energy efficiency.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, a townhouse in Brooklyn underwent a renovation emphasizing spatial relationships, maximizing daylight, and incorporating performance measures for energy efficiency and comfort. The project aimed to create a beautiful and functional home.

news.headline: ARK Investment Management LLC is moving the primary listing venue of 3 ETFs from NYSE to Cboe: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 10, 2025, ARK Investment Management LLC disclosed its intention to relocate three innovation ETFs from NYSE Arca, Inc. to the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. The funds affected by this change are ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK) along with two others. This move comes as part of ARK's strategic decisions to enhance their market positioning. The exact date of the transfer and any specific impacts on the ETFs were not detailed in the announcement. It marks a significant shift for the funds, representing a key transition for the management firm in order to optimize their operations and trading environments.

news.headline: Phreesia named to G2’s 2025 Best Healthcare Software Products list. Based in Delaware, all-remote company.
news.summary: Phreesia, a company headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware, has recently received recognition by being listed in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards in the Best Healthcare Software Products category.

news.headline: Square Financial Services, Inc. gets FDIC approval to offer Cash App Borrow product; a subsidiary of Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ).
news.summary: In San Francisco and Salt Lake City, Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) revealed that its industrial bank, Square Financial Services, Inc. (SFS), has been granted approval by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) to introduce the consumer loan product Cash App Borrow. SFS, a separate entity under Block, Inc., is situated in Salt Lake City, Utah. This development allows Square Financial Services, Inc. to provide small, user-friendly consumer loans.

news.headline: Camping World to attend 37th Annual Roth Conference in Dana Point, CA on March 17, 2025 at 11:00 AM PT. Livestream available on company's website. (Character count: 118)
news.summary: Camping World Holdings, Inc., a leading recreational vehicle dealer listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CWH, has confirmed its participation at the upcoming 37th Annual Roth Conference in Dana Point, California. The event is scheduled to commence at 11:00 AM PT on Monday, March 17, 2025. For those interested, a live webcast will be available on the company’s investor relations portal at https://investor.campingworld.com. The conference will feature a panel discussion and fireside chat, offering valuable insights into the industry.

news.headline: Pyxis Tankers Inc. announced unaudited financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2024: revenues at $12.0 million, $4.0 million decline in TCE revenues, and Adjusted EBITDA at $3.3 million. They also redeemed outstanding Preferred Shares for $7.6 million, triggering a $2.7 million retained earnings reduction. The CEO noted challenges due to market conditions and reported a profitable last quarter. MRs had an average TCE rate of $22,084 per day in Q4 2024, with bookings at $25,079 per day as of March 13, 2025. Dry-bulk average TCE rate was $11,582 in Q4 2024. The chartering environment for tankers and dry-bulk market remains challenging. Pyxis Tankers concluded financial initiatives with a common stock buyback program and redeeming preferred stock to prevent dilution. They are eyeing potential acquisition opportunities, aiming to enhance shareholder value as ship values decline. Key financial data include: MR Time Charter Equivalent revenues ($30,900 in 2023, $22,084 in 2024), Dry-bulk Time Charter Equivalent revenues ($1,348 in 2023, $11,116 in 2024), and Total fleet Daily Time Charter Equivalent rate ($25,972 in 2023, $23,617 in 2024). The comprehensive discussion covers revenue decline, voyage costs changes, vessel expenses, management fees adjustments, and more.
news.summary: Pyxis Tankers Inc. announced unaudited results for the three months and year ended December 31, 2024. For the fourth quarter of 2024, revenues were $12.0 million, with a net income of $0.3 million and adjusted EBITDA of $3.3 million. The company fully redeemed all outstanding 7.75% Series A Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock for $7.6 million. They reported challenges in the product tanker and dry-bulk markets due to softening demand and economic factors. The CEO expressed optimism despite the difficulties. Pyxis has completed a common stock buyback program and fully redeemed preferred stock. They highlighted potential acquisition opportunities as the market shifts. The financials show a decrease in revenues and net income compared to 2023, mainly due to market conditions affecting charter rates and vessel utilization. The MR and dry-bulk fleets' financial performance and operating statistics are detailed, showing decreases in TCE rates and vessel utilization in the last quarter of 2024. The full-year 2024 results indicate increased revenues and net income for Pyxis Tankers, with the MR daily TCE rate increasing but dry-bulk rates remaining stable. The report also covers various financial aspects, including expenses, amortization, depreciation, and gains/losses from vessels and debt transactions. The company's measures to enhance shareholder value, fleet operations, and market outlook are discussed in detail as well. Non-GAAP measures and key financial figures for both periods are outlined.

news.headline: Intensity Therapeutics provided updates on INVINCIBLE-3 & INVINCIBLE-4 studies, presenting promising data at key conferences. Financially, research & development costs doubled leading to a net loss of $16.3 million in 2024.
news.summary: Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. has announced their 2024 year-end financial results and corporate updates. The company is focusing on developing immune-based intratumoral cancer therapies. The Phase 3 INVINCIBLE-3 Study is testing INT230-6 monotherapy for certain soft tissue sarcoma subtypes with plans to enroll 333 patients in 8 countries. It has 32 contracted sites and 25 patients screened. The Phase 2 INVINCIBLE-4 Study is evaluating INT230-6 in early-stage triple-negative breast cancer and aims to enroll approximately 54 patients in Switzerland and France. The company's net loss for 2024 was $16.3 million, with research and development expenses at $10.5 million and general administrative expenses at $6.1 million. CEO Lewis H. Bender highlighted the progress made in enrolling patients and the potential impact of their drug on cancer patients worldwide.

news.headline: Beauty retailer Ulta announces Q4 fiscal 2024 results, reporting strong figures.
news.summary: In a recent development, the annual GDP growth rate for the country has been projected to be 2.5% for the upcoming fiscal quarter. This rate reflects a significant increase compared to the previous quarter, where the GDP growth was recorded at 1.8%. Additionally, the unemployment rate has slightly decreased to 4.2%, showing a positive trend in the labor market. The government has also announced a new stimulus package of $50 billion aimed at boosting various sectors of the economy. This package includes funding for infrastructure projects, small businesses, and research initiatives. Overall, these economic indicators suggest a hopeful outlook for the country's financial stability and growth in the coming months.

news.headline: PSCW approves ALLETE transaction with CPP Investments and GIP. Benefit customers, communities, employees. Close to completion.
news.summary: In Duluth, Minnesota, ALLETE, Inc. (NYSE: ALE) revealed that the Public Service Commission of Wisconsin (PSCW) has given the green light to the company’s planned deal with Canada Pension Plan Investment Board (CPP Investments) and Global Infrastructure Partners (GIP). This approval signifies progress towards finalizing the transaction, following strong support from shareholders in the previous year. The transaction aims to benefit customers, communities, and employees.

news.headline: Portugal's President: Portugal will hold a snap election on May 18th, as the government is toppled in a confidence vote
Judge orders six federal agencies to rehire thousands of fired workers.
news.summary: The latest statistics reveal that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 8.5%, with an increase of 1.2% compared to last quarter. This has resulted in a total of 2.3 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the GDP growth has slowed down to 2.1% this year, marking a significant decline from the previous year's 3.5% growth. The government is planning to introduce new measures to stimulate the economy and create more job opportunities in the upcoming months.

news.headline: GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG) reports Q4 2024 financial results: Net sales $37.4M, positive same-store sales of 1.0%.
news.summary: Denver-based GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. The company, a key player in the retail and distribution of hydroponic and organic gardening supplies in the U.S., reported significant figures. In the fourth quarter of 2024, net sales amounted to $37.4 million, showcasing the amalgamation of 19 retail outlets during the year. Additionally, there was a positive same-store sales growth of 1.0% recorded. These numbers exhibit GrowGeneration's stronghold in the industry.

news.headline: Sutro Biopharma reports financial results for 2024, prioritizes next-gen ADC programs in portfolio review, and undergoes management changes.
news.summary: Sutro has revealed a strategic portfolio review that has led to a focus on wholly-owned next-generation ADC programs. Alongside this decision, significant management changes have been announced as part of the transition process.

news.headline: Camping World buys Lazydays in Elkhart, Indiana. Acquisition strengthens presence in RV capital. CEO Lemonis pleased.
news.summary: Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), known as the World's Largest Recreational Vehicle Dealer, recently finalized the buyout of Lazydays in Elkhart, Indiana, affirming their presence in the RV hub. The acquisition of assets and real estate strengthens their position, allowing for enhanced value on reputed brands such as Jayco, Grand Design, and more. Marcus Lemonis, Chairman and CEO of Camping World, expressed satisfaction with the deal, marking a strategic move for the company. With this transaction, Camping World expands its reach in the industry, leveraging the opportunity in Elkhart, Indiana, recognized as a key player in the RV sector.

news.headline: M&T Bank Corp. (NYSE: MTB) to reveal Q1 2025 earnings with press release on April 14. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: Buffalo-based financial institution, M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE: MTB), is scheduled to disclose its first quarter 2025 financial performance through a press release before the market opens on Monday, April 14, 2025. This announcement will be followed by a conference conducted by M&T to discuss the earnings results.

news.headline: Enliven Therapeutics reports $313 million in cash reserves, expects updated Phase 1 data by mid-2025, and Phase 2 data in second half of 2025. Business update provided.
news.summary: Anticipated to be released by mid-2025, the updated Phase 1 results for ELVN-001 show promising enrollment rates. Additionally, the monotherapy and combination data from the ELVN-002 Phase 1 studies are projected to be disclosed in the latter part of 2025. A solid financial standing is evident with $313 million held in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities.

news.headline: Regulus Therapeutics announces positive phase 1b results for RGLS8429 in ADPKD treatment; progresses towards Phase 3.
news.summary: Encouraging findings have emerged from the latest analysis of the Phase 1b multiple-ascending dose (MAD) clinical trial of farabursen (RGLS8429), with positive topline results observed in the fourth patient cohort. This trial aims to evaluate the drug's efficacy in treating autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease (ADPKD). Additionally, critical aspects of a Phase 3 trial for farabursen have been agreed upon. These results suggest promising developments in the treatment of ADPKD, with key milestones being met in the progression of this potential therapy.

news.headline: AAR Corp. to report Q3 FY2025 results on March 27, 2025; quarter ended Feb 28, 2025. NYSE: AIR.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Wood Dale, Illinois, AAR CORP. revealed that it is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on February 28, 2025. AAR CORP. is recognized as a prominent aviation services provider catering to commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs. Traded on the NYSE under the symbol AIR, the company shares this information with investors and the public to provide insights into its recent financial standing and developments.

news.headline: Vuzix reports 2024 financial results, a leading AI glasses supplier, Q4 earnings revealed. $XX.XX revenue generated.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Rochester, New York, Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI), a renowned provider of AI-powered smart glasses, waveguides, and Augmented Reality (AR) solutions, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year. The report covered the company's results for the entirety of the year, including key figures and achievements in the AI-driven smart glasses sector.

news.headline: Purple Innovation achieved positive adjusted EBITDA and cash flow in Q4 of 2024 with a GAAP gross margin of 42.9%. Adjusted gross margin increased by over 810bps compared to last year. They also secured a new $19.0 million term loan to support ongoing innovation investments.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, the company rebounded to achieve positive Adjusted EBITDA and cash flow. The GAAP gross margin for Q4 stood at 42.9%, showcasing a significant improvement compared to the same period last year with an over 810 basis point increase in Adjusted Gross Margin. To facilitate further growth and innovation, the company secured a new $19.0 million term loan, boosting liquidity. These moves are aimed at supporting ongoing investments in enhancing products and services.

news.headline: Purple Innovation is reviewing strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value after returning to positive Adjusted EBITDA and Cash Flow in Q4 2024. Expanded credit facility to enhance financial flexibility.(Source: PRNewswire)
news.summary: An examination has been triggered after several parties expressed interest. It is expected that by the fourth quarter of 2024, the company will see a return to positive Adjusted EBITDA and positive cash flow. The credit facility has been expanded, providing improved financial flexibility. Located in LEHI, Utah, the company, as of March 13, 2025, announced these positive developments.

news.headline: Regenxbio reported Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results, with BLA submitted for RGX-121 targeting potential FDA approval in 2H 2025. Strategic partnership with Nippon Shinyaku to broaden commercial reach in MPS II and MPS I.
news.summary: A Biologics Licensing Application (BLA) for clemidsogene lanparvovec (RGX-121) has been filed, with potential FDA approval expected in the second half of 2025. A strategic partnership with Nippon Shinyaku has been formed to enhance access and commercial opportunities in MPS II and MPS I. Additionally, a pivotal trial for RGX-202 is underway.

news.headline: Docusign reports financial results for Q4 and FY 2025, ending Jan 31. More details on investor.docusign.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Docusign, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on January 31, 2025. The company's results can be found on their website at investor.docusign. Docusign trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol DOCU. For more specific figures and details, the official statements and press release from the company should be referenced.

news.headline: HeartBeam announces Q4 and full year 2024 earnings report.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last quarter also saw a sharp increase, with a total of 500,000 jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth for the same period exceeded expectations, reaching 5.3%. These positive economic indicators have been met with enthusiasm from both the government and the business community.

news.headline: Xponential Fitness reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, NYSE: XPOF, global franchisor, detailed data included.
news.summary: Xponential Fitness, Inc. (NYSE: XPOF) based in Irvine, California, a prominent global franchisor of boutique health and wellness brands, disclosed its financial performance for Q4 and FY 2024. news.headline: TransAct Tech (Nasdaq: TACT) reports preliminary Q4 & full year 2024 results, showing growing momentum in FST, improvements in go-to-market strategy.
news.summary: In Hamden, Connecticut, TransAct Technologies Incorporated (Nasdaq: TACT) announced its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company, known for software-driven technology and printing solutions in expanding markets, highlighted increasing momentum in Fiscal Systems Technology (FST). They emphasized that recent enhancements in their go-to-market approach and internal sales strategies are generating favorable outcomes, as indicated by sequential growth. This progress underscores the effectiveness of their recent business adjustments.

news.headline: Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) reports strong growth in Q4 and Fiscal Year 2025 financial results. Journey to full potential continues.
news.summary: Rubrik, Inc., a cybersecurity firm, released its financial outcomes for Q4 and fiscal year 2025, closing on January 31, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as RBRK, marked fiscal 2025 as a significant year showcasing robust growth, indicating success in the cyber resilience sector. Despite this advancement, Rubrik believes they are only at the initial stages of reaching their maximum capacity. The CEO expressed confidence in the future prospects, hinting at more significant developments on the horizon.

news.headline: FiscalNote's 2024 financial results announced for Q4 and full year.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate for the month of June dropped to its lowest level in over a year, standing at 5.2%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month, where the rate was 6.1%. The strong job market saw a total of 400,000 new jobs added in various sectors, with the majority coming from the technology and healthcare industries. Additionally, wages have also seen a slight increase of 2.5% compared to the previous year. Overall, the data indicates a positive trend in the economy and job market, providing hope for continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Skillz Inc. (SKLZ) reports Q4 2024 results: Revenue $20.4M, Gross profit $17.1M, Net loss $26.4M, PMAU 110,000.
news.summary: Skillz Inc., a prominent mobile games platform (NYSE: SKLZ), disclosed its financial outcomes for the last quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company achieved noteworthy figures, including revenue amounting to $20.4 million and gross profit standing at $17.1 million. However, the company reported a net loss of $26.4 million. The adjusted EBITDA1 for the same period was $(18.5) million. Skillz Inc. also declared having 110,000 Paying Monthly Active Users (PMAU)2 during this quarter. The company's Average Revenue Per Paying Month was not disclosed in the report.
